title: Fix seeds show output truncation - content not fully visible in terminal
description:
When running 'seeds show <id>', the output gets truncated in the terminal. User must hit Ctrl+O to expand, but then cannot type responses while in expanded mode. This blocks the workflow of viewing a seed and giving feedback simultaneously.

Possible fixes:
- Smarter output formatting (more compact)
- Pagination for long content
- Option to limit content preview with --full flag for complete output
- Output to temp file and display path

Related seed: seed-13ba
close_reason: Solution: Claude pastes seed content in response text when user needs to see it. Bash output comes to Claude fully even if truncated on user's screen. Added guidance to prime output for nuanced behavior: display when discussing seeds with user, don't display when reading for own context. See seed-13ba for full deliberation.

title: Clickable tags that filter seed list
close_reason: Implemented clickable tags with URL parameter filtering

title: Change SEEDS references to lowercase seeds

close_reason: Changed all SEEDS references to lowercase seeds in source, tests, and comments. Constants like SEEDS_DIR remain uppercase per Python convention.

title: SEEDS MVP Implementation
description: Implement the minimum viable product for SEEDS deliberation capture tool. See plans/mvp.md for full specification.
close_reason: MVP complete! All 13 child tasks implemented: project setup, data models, database layer, CLI framework, create/jot, list/show, status changes, questions, relationships, sync/export, prime, doctor, init

title: Project setup with uv
description: Set up Python project structure: pyproject.toml with click dependency, src/seeds/ directory structure, __init__.py
close_reason: Project structure set up with src/seeds/, pyproject.toml with click dependency, CLI entry point working

title: Implement sync and export
description: seeds sync (--flush-only) to export to .seeds/seeds.jsonl. JSONL format with one seed per line, questions embedded. Create export.py module.
close_reason: Implemented export.py module and sync command with JSONL export including embedded questions

title: Implement prime command
description: seeds prime outputs AI-optimized workflow context for Claude Code hooks. Include core rules, essential commands, session end protocol. Create prime.py module.
close_reason: Implemented prime.py module and prime command with AI-optimized workflow context

title: Implement doctor command
description: seeds doctor to check for issues: database integrity, orphaned questions, sync status. Basic health check.
close_reason: Implemented doctor command with database, seeds, questions, and sync checks

title: Implement init command
description: seeds init to create .seeds/ directory with empty database. Check if already initialized.
close_reason: Init command already implemented in seeds-pt5.4 - creates .seeds/ directory, checks if already initialized

title: Define data models
description: Create models.py with Seed, Question dataclasses. SeedStatus enum (captured, exploring, deferred, resolved, abandoned). SeedType enum (idea, question, decision, exploration, concern). Hash-based ID generation with hierarchical support (seed-a1b2.1).
close_reason: Created models.py with Seed, Question dataclasses, enums, and ID generation functions

title: SQLite database layer
description: Create db.py with Database class. Schema creation for seeds and questions tables. CRUD operations. Handle hierarchical IDs for parent-child relationships. Derive blocked state from unresolved children.
close_reason: Created db.py with Database class, schema, CRUD for seeds/questions, hierarchical IDs, blocked state detection

title: CLI framework and entry point
description: Create cli.py with Click-based CLI. Set up main entry point. Add to pyproject.toml scripts. Basic --help and version.
close_reason: CLI framework with Context class, pass_context decorator, require_init decorator, and init command implemented

title: Implement create and jot commands
description: seeds create --title --content --type --tags --parent. seeds jot 'Quick thought' for minimal friction capture. Both create seeds with status=captured.
close_reason: Implemented create command with --title, --content, --type, --tags, --parent options and jot command for quick capture

title: Implement list and show commands
description: seeds list with filters: --status, --type, --tag, --all. seeds show <id> with --questions flag. seeds ready, seeds deferred, seeds blocked (derived from unresolved children).
close_reason: Implemented list, show, ready, deferred, blocked commands with filters and status icons

title: Implement status change commands
description: seeds explore <id> (captured→exploring). seeds defer <id> (→deferred). seeds resolve <id> (→resolved). seeds abandon <id> --reason (→abandoned). seeds update <id> --title/--content/--tags/--append.
close_reason: Implemented explore, defer, resolve, abandon, and update commands with proper status transitions

title: Implement question commands
description: seeds ask 'Question?' --seed=<id> to attach question. seeds answer <q-id> 'Answer'. seeds questions to list open questions. Question IDs like q-a1b2.
close_reason: Implemented ask, answer, and questions commands with proper question lifecycle

title: Implement relationship commands
description: seeds link <id> --relates-to <other-id> for loose coupling. seeds tree <id> to show hierarchy and relationships.
close_reason: Implemented link and tree commands with bidirectional linking and hierarchy display

title: Add Claude hooks/agent integration for seeds

close_reason: Implemented seeds hooks integration: 1) Modified seeds prime to silently exit when not in a seeds project (like beads). 2) Added find_seeds_dir() function to walk up directory tree. 3) Installed seeds globally via uv tool. 4) Added seeds prime hooks to SessionStart and PreCompact in ~/.claude/settings.json. 5) Added tests for new functionality.
